headline: AMD Rackspace AI Cloud Deal Targets Regulated Growth And Valuation Questions
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) and Rackspace Technology have agreed a multi-year partnership to build a managed Enterprise AI Cloud for highly regulated sectors. The platform will use AMD Instinct GPUs and EPYC CPUs, with a focus on security, governance, and regulatory compliance. The collaboration is aimed at organizations that need sovereign and compliant AI solutions, an area often underserved by general purpose cloud offerings.
